title: Adding pdf files to the boards
excerpt: How can I add PDF files to the main tables as attachments? I see where you can upload files, but that only applies to excel docs. I need to attach PDF files…

posts.author: nblanchard (Cristian)
posts.cookedHtml: How can I add PDF files to the main tables as attachments? I see where you can upload files, but that only applies to excel docs. I need to attach PDF files…

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @nblanchard

Welcome to the community! There are two areas where you can add files to:

  • add a file column and you can add files (also pdf) for each item
  • you can also add a file in the item updates

Hope that fits your use case.

posts.author: JenefaJ (Jenefa)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yes, this is possible with The PDF Maker (app.thepdfmaker.com).

You can configure The PDF Maker to generate PDF reports from your dashboards and automatically email them at set intervals. Just define your data source, create a template with placeholders, and set up an automation that triggers PDF generation and email delivery based on a schedule — daily, weekly, etc.

Every new response triggers PDF generation.

Please view the support article below:

help.thepdfmaker.com

Automate Documents with the Monday App - Full Guide | The PDF Maker Help Center

Master document automation using the Monday app and PDF Maker. Streamline workflows and enhance productivity by effortlessly generating PDFs directly from Monday.com.
